summary: Comprehensive testing of School LMS with userId-based authentication and enhanced fee management completed successfully

ui_bugs.issue: Student selection dropdown in fee management has click interception issues
ui_bugs.workaround: Dropdown functionality works but may require multiple clicks or force=True

passed_tests: Teacher login with admin/teacher123 using user_id field
Login page shows 'User ID' field instead of 'Email'
Teacher can create new student with user_id and password
Student login with newly created credentials works
Fee setup and payment recording functionality
Fee overview displays total, paid, pending correctly
All backend API endpoints (16/16 tests passed)
